caption: A small audience sits in a wood-paneled room, facing two men standing at a podium. One man wears a white shirt and a dark vest, holding an acoustic guitar, while the other man stands beside him. The audience consists of several people seen from behind; notable individuals include a woman in a yellow shirt, a man in a maroon hoodie, and a woman in a white sweater. The setting features vertical wood slats on the walls and dark seating. Across the scene, the man with the guitar remains in a similar position, though his arm movements shift slightly. A white logo containing the text "ORCA" appears in the lower center-right of the frame in each shot. The camera remains static, capturing the consistent arrangement of the crowd and the presenters as the scene unfolds.
